## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Dashboard / QA Impact

- [ ] `dashboard.html` still loads at `/dashboard.html`.
- [ ] Figma design URL remains required wherever design QA is started.
- [ ] Developed page URL remains required wherever design QA is started.
- [ ] QA Docs still shows markdown rules, checklist files, latest reports, and generated issue files.
- [ ] GitHub issue filing still includes Figma URL, developed page URL, comparison, evidence, and acceptance criteria.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run qa`
- [ ] `npm run qa:design`

## Security

- [ ] No real tokens, API keys, credentials, JWTs, or secrets were committed.
- [ ] Protected URLs were tested with `HTTP_AUTH_USERNAME` and `HTTP_AUTH_PASSWORD` when applicable.
- [ ] Security preflight findings were reviewed.
